build_status.build_output: electron-vite build completed successfully. Main: 87.11 kB, Preload: 0.40 kB, Renderer: 1,851.17 kB

prd_compliance.details: All 6 steps implemented with correct content. Step indicator visual matches spec (numbered circles, Check icon for completed steps, connecting lines). Navigation buttons work correctly (Anterior disabled at step 0, Proximo shown for steps 0-4, Comecar shown at step 5). localStorage integration verified. Redirect logic implemented. Como Funciona? link converted to /bem-vindo route. driver.js completely removed (CSS, component, package).

code_quality.details: No hardcoded colors detected (all use CSS variables). No unused imports. Proper TypeScript types. Component follows existing page patterns (PageHeader, Card structure). Named export convention followed. Clean code structure with STEPS constant. Inline RedirectOnboarding component in App.tsx is simple and effective.

dark_mode.details: All background classes use theme variables (bg-background, bg-card, bg-muted, bg-primary, bg-primary/10, bg-primary/5). All text classes use theme variables (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, text-primary, text-primary-foreground). Border classes use border-border, border-primary, border-2. No hardcoded gray-*/white/black colors found. Stepper uses bg-primary/bg-muted with proper text contrast. Will work correctly in both light and dark modes.

redirect_logic.details: RedirectOnboarding component correctly checks localStorage flag AND pathname === '/' to prevent redirect loops. Uses replace: true for clean navigation history. Only redirects on first visit when user lands on root path. Will not redirect if already in /bem-vindo or any other route. Clean implementation with useEffect, useNavigate, useLocation.

cleanup.details: OnboardingTour.tsx deleted (verified: file does not exist). No imports of OnboardingTour anywhere (grep found no matches). driver.js CSS removed from index.css (file ends cleanly at line 140 with color theme overrides). No tourId properties found in AppSidebar (grep returned no matches). No tour-* IDs in sidebar DOM. driver.js not in package.json dependencies (grep returned CLEAN). Como Funciona? converted to Link component using asChild pattern (matches Configuracoes pattern). All cleanup tasks completed successfully.

content_quality.details: All content in Portuguese as specified. Non-technical language appropriate for end users (pais do Marco, RH do Supermercado). Step 1 clearly communicates value proposition (Voce cadastra, o sistema gera). Steps 2-4 explain entities (Setores, Demandas, Colaboradores) with concrete examples (Caixa 08:00-22:00, CLT 44h). Step 5 visualizes workflow (Gerar → Ajustar → Oficializar). Step 6 provides clear CTA and quick links. Visual examples using Badge components are clean and helpful.

ux_implementation.details: Custom stepper implemented with 3 visual states (complete: bg-primary with Check icon, active: bg-primary with ring-2, pending: bg-muted with number). Labels hidden on mobile (hidden sm:block). Connecting lines change color based on state (bg-primary if complete, bg-border if pending). Step content animates with key={currentStep} and animate-in fade-in duration-300. Large icon circles per step centered in CardHeader. Navigation bar with proper button states. Progress text visible. Pular tour always accessible.

suggestions.description: Consider adding keyboard navigation (arrow keys to move between steps, Escape to skip). Not required by PRD but would enhance accessibility.
suggestions.fix: Optional: Add useEffect with keydown listener for Left/Right arrows and Escape key.

summary: Implementation APPROVED. All PRD requirements met: 6-step onboarding page with correct content, custom stepper visual, navigation buttons, localStorage integration, redirect on first visit, Como Funciona? link working, driver.js completely removed. Code quality excellent: zero hardcoded colors (full dark mode support), clean structure, follows existing patterns. TypeScript check and production build both pass with zero errors. No critical, major, or minor issues found. Only one optional suggestion for keyboard navigation (not blocking). Ready for deployment.
